Competency probe: Require If-Match or explicit version for conflicting reader or source changes and return typed recovery on mismatch.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts If Match Write model · Theory Feed Ts If Match W…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Idempotent desired-state commands cannot have concurrency conflicts.
